2223  execve("/bin/ls", ["/bin/ls", "/tmp"], 0x7ffec8da5ff0 /* 25 vars */) = 0
2223  access("/etc/ld.so.preload", R_OK) = -1 ENOENT (No such file or directory)
2223  openat(AT_FDCWD, "/etc/ld.so.cache", O_RDONLY|O_CLOEXEC) = 3
